title: Horigen Breast pump accessories: 109PP silicone accessories silicone cushion(2PCS)

title: Eufy Breast Pump Accessories
detail_text: Enhance your breastfeeding experience with eufy breast pump accessories, including valves, flanges, and more. Compatible with eufy breast pumps, each accessory is designed for optimal comfort and efficiency. Whether you need replacements or extras, these accessories are essential for every breastfeeding journey. Flange for E10 (27mm, 2 Pcs) Specifically designed for mums with a larger nipple size compared to the standard flange, offering a comfortable and secure fit for optimal performance. Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump E10. Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning. Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed. Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience. Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs. Flange for E10 (24mm, 2 Pcs) Replacement or spare set of flange for your E10. Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump E10. Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning. Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed. Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience. Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs. Milk Container for E10 (2 Pcs) Compatibility: Specifically designed for the eufy Wearable Breast Pump E10. Safe Materials: Crafted from BPA-free plastic, ensuring safety for both mother and baby. Easy to Clean: Simple to wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Dishwasher, fridge, and freezer-safe for added convenience. Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 6 months. Replace when suction or performance diminishes, or after extensive use and sterilization. Inserts (15, 17, 19, 21mm, 2 Pcs) Compatibility: Works with eufy Wearable Breast Pump E10, E20, S1, and S1 Pro models. Sizing Guide: Refer to our sizing guide provided in your eufy Breast Pump Kit to find the perfect fit for optimal comfort. Nipple size may change throughout different stages of breastfeeding, requiring adjustments in flange inserts. Safe Material: Made from food-grade, soft silicone for safety and comfort. Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance decreases with use, sterilization, or based on your individual needs. Available in sizes 15mm, 17mm, 19mm and 21mm. Flange for S1/S1 Pro, E20 (24mm/27mm, 2 Pcs) Replacement or spare set of flange for your S1 or S1 Pro, E20 breast pumps. Experience soothing warmth during pumping sessions with our innovative HeatFlow technology. Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump S1 or S1 Pro, E20. Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning. Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed. Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience. Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs. Cleaning Brush (1-Pack) Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Cleaning Brush*1 Customized for eufy Breast Pumps: Designed to reach every corner of your breast pump, this brush ensures thorough cleaning. Safe and Durable: The brush head is crafted from durable, food-grade PP+ material to ensure both safety and longevity. Versatile Use: Ideal for cleaning nipples, squeeze tops, and sippy cups of all shapes and sizes. Compact and strong enough to clean small parts. Gentle on soft materials. S1/S1 Pro/E20 Container - 2pcs Compatibility: Only compatible with eufy Breast Pump S1 / S1 Pro / E20. Safe Materials: Made from BPA-free plastic materials, safe for mother and baby. Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. Dishwasher, fridge, and freezer-safe for quick and easy cleaning. Lifespan: Typically lasts 6 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage. Duckbill Valve - 4pcs Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro. Closed, Anti-Blackflow Design: Designed to prevent backflow of breast milk and help direct milk to the bottom of the container, ensuring no loss of suction. The slit on the valve tips remains closed when not pumping. Food-Grade Silicone: Made from durable, BPA-free, food-grade silicone, the duckbill valves are soft, odorless, and skin-friendly for both mother and baby. The snug fit offers comfort and efficient pumping. Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. To deep clean, use boiling water or steam at no more than 100℃ (212℉) for 5-10 minutes. Avoid hard brushes; use fingertips instead. Lifespan: Typically lasts 1-3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage. E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Spout Cap - 4pcs Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro. Prevents Leaks from the Top: Features a spill-proof valve to help prevent messy spills and keep things clean. Safety First: Made from food-grade silicone, the spout cap that comes into contact with breast milk ensures safety and gives you peace of mind about your baby's milk. Lifespan: Typically lasts 3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage. E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Dust Cover - 2pcs Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro. Safe Material: Our dust cover is made from food-grade plastic. Keeps the Flange Clean: Safeguards your milk from spills and contaminants with the silicone breast pump dust cover. Its snug fit ensures reliable, spill-proof protection. Universal Compatibility: Designed to fit all eufy Breast Pump models, this dust cover is a versatile and essential accessory. One-Piece Lid Design: Made from food-grade plastic, our lightweight and flexible breast pump dust cover is easy to handle and durable for repeated use. Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. To sterilize, boil in water or steam. Lifespan: Typically lasts 6 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage. S1/S1Pro Magnet Charging Cable - 1pc Compatibility: Only compatible with eufy Breast Pump S1 / S1 Pro. Charge Two at Once: Charge two breast pumps simultaneously with this magnetic charging cable. Enjoy the streamlined process without having to look for multiple charging ports. Hassle-Free Magnetic Charging: Ensures a hands-free, tangle-free, quick, and easy recharge. Ideal for Work and Travel: Easily fits into your briefcase, purse, backpack, or suitcase, making it perfect for the office or trips out of town. 1-Year Lifespan: Durable for one-year use. E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Diaphragm (2pcs) Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro. Food-Grade Silicone: Made from food-grade silicone, the diaphragm is safe for both mother and baby and durable for repeated use and sterilization. Flexible and Durable:The silicone material offers the flexibility needed to maintain a steady suction while being robust enough to withstand wear and tear over time. Easy to Clean: The smooth surface allows for effortless cleaning and sterilization. Guaranteed Reliability: eufy breast pump accessories are covered by a 90-day limited manufacturer's warranty. Typically lasts 1-3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.
detail_html:
Enhance your breastfeeding experience with eufy breast pump accessories, including valves, flanges, and more. Compatible with eufy breast pumps, each accessory is designed for optimal comfort and efficiency. Whether you need replacements or extras, these accessories are essential for every breastfeeding journey.

Flange for E10 (27mm, 2 Pcs)

Specifically designed for mums with a larger nipple size compared to the standard  flange, offering a comfortable and secure fit for optimal performance.

Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump E10.

Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning.

Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed.

Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs.

Flange for E10 (24mm, 2 Pcs)

Replacement or spare set of flange for your E10. 

Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump E10.

Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning.

Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed.

Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs.

Milk Container for E10 (2 Pcs)

Compatibility: Specifically designed for the eufy Wearable Breast Pump E10.

Safe Materials: Crafted from BPA-free plastic, ensuring safety for both mother and baby.

Easy to Clean: Simple to wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Dishwasher, fridge, and freezer-safe for added convenience.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 6 months. Replace when suction or performance diminishes, or after extensive use and sterilization.

Inserts (15, 17, 19, 21mm, 2 Pcs)

Compatibility: Works with eufy Wearable Breast Pump E10, E20, S1, and S1 Pro models.

Sizing Guide: Refer to our sizing guide provided in your eufy Breast Pump Kit to find the perfect fit for optimal comfort. Nipple size may change throughout different stages of breastfeeding, requiring adjustments in flange inserts.

Safe Material: Made from food-grade, soft silicone for safety and comfort.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance decreases with use, sterilization, or based on your individual needs.

Available in sizes 15mm, 17mm, 19mm and 21mm.

Flange for S1/S1 Pro, E20 (24mm/27mm, 2 Pcs)

Replacement or spare set of flange for your S1 or S1 Pro, E20 breast pumps. Experience soothing warmth during pumping sessions with our innovative HeatFlow technology.

Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump S1 or S1 Pro, E20.

Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning.

Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed.

Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs.

Cleaning Brush (1-Pack)

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Cleaning Brush*1

Customized for eufy Breast Pumps: Designed to reach every corner of your breast pump, this brush ensures thorough cleaning.

Safe and Durable: The brush head is crafted from durable, food-grade PP+ material to ensure both safety and longevity.

Versatile Use: Ideal for cleaning nipples, squeeze tops, and sippy cups of all shapes and sizes. Compact and strong enough to clean small parts. Gentle on soft materials.

S1/S1 Pro/E20 Container - 2pcs

Compatibility: Only compatible with eufy Breast Pump S1 / S1 Pro / E20.

Safe Materials: Made from BPA-free plastic materials, safe for mother and baby.

Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. Dishwasher, fridge, and freezer-safe for quick and easy cleaning.

Lifespan: Typically lasts 6 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

Duckbill Valve - 4pcs

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro.

Closed, Anti-Blackflow Design: Designed to prevent backflow of breast milk and help direct milk to the bottom of the container, ensuring no loss of suction. The slit on the valve tips remains closed when not pumping.

Food-Grade Silicone: Made from durable, BPA-free, food-grade silicone, the duckbill valves are soft, odorless, and skin-friendly for both mother and baby. The snug fit offers comfort and efficient pumping.

Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. To deep clean, use boiling water or steam at no more than 100℃ (212℉) for 5-10 minutes. Avoid hard brushes; use fingertips instead.

Lifespan: Typically lasts 1-3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Spout Cap - 4pcs

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro.

Prevents Leaks from the Top: Features a spill-proof valve to help prevent messy spills and keep things clean.

Safety First: Made from food-grade silicone, the spout cap that comes into contact with breast milk ensures safety and gives you peace of mind about your baby's milk.

Lifespan: Typically lasts 3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Dust Cover - 2pcs

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro.

Safe Material: Our dust cover is made from food-grade plastic.

Keeps the Flange Clean: Safeguards your milk from spills and contaminants with the silicone breast pump dust cover. Its snug fit ensures reliable, spill-proof protection.

Universal Compatibility: Designed to fit all eufy Breast Pump models, this dust cover is a versatile and essential accessory.

One-Piece Lid Design: Made from food-grade plastic, our lightweight and flexible breast pump dust cover is easy to handle and durable for repeated use.

Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. To sterilize, boil in water or steam.

Lifespan: Typically lasts 6 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

S1/S1Pro Magnet Charging Cable - 1pc

Compatibility: Only compatible with eufy Breast Pump S1 / S1 Pro.

Charge Two at Once: Charge two breast pumps simultaneously with this magnetic charging cable. Enjoy the streamlined process without having to look for multiple charging ports.

Hassle-Free Magnetic Charging: Ensures a hands-free, tangle-free, quick, and easy recharge.

Ideal for Work and Travel: Easily fits into your briefcase, purse, backpack, or suitcase, making it perfect for the office or trips out of town.

1-Year Lifespan: Durable for one-year use.

E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Diaphragm (2pcs)

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro.

  1. Food-Grade Silicone: Made from food-grade silicone, the diaphragm is safe for both mother and baby and durable for repeated use and sterilization.
  2. Flexible and Durable:The silicone material offers the flexibility needed to maintain a steady suction while being robust enough to withstand wear and tear over time.
  3. Easy to Clean: The smooth surface allows for effortless cleaning and sterilization.
  4. Guaranteed Reliability: eufy breast pump accessories are covered by a 90-day limited manufacturer's warranty.
  5. Typically lasts 1-3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

aiTexts: Eufy Breast Pump Accessories include valves, flanges, milk containers, and inserts designed for comfort and efficiency.
Soft, durable silicone material ensures strong suction and secure sealing with a comfy ergonomic fit.
Compatible with Eufy Breast Pump E10, S1, and S1 Pro models, offering various flange sizes to suit changing nipple sizes.
Accessories are BPA-free, easy to clean with warm soapy water, and safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use.
Replacement recommended every 3 to 6 months depending on usage and performance.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
Enhance your breastfeeding experience with eufy breast pump accessories, including valves, flanges, and more. Compatible with eufy breast pumps, each accessory is designed for optimal comfort and efficiency. Whether you need replacements or extras, these accessories are essential for every breastfeeding journey.

Flange for E10 (27mm, 2 Pcs)

Specifically designed for mums with a larger nipple size compared to the standard  flange, offering a comfortable and secure fit for optimal performance.

Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump E10.

Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning.

Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed.

Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs.

Flange for E10 (24mm, 2 Pcs)

Replacement or spare set of flange for your E10. 

Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump E10.

Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning.

Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed.

Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs.

Milk Container for E10 (2 Pcs)

Compatibility: Specifically designed for the eufy Wearable Breast Pump E10.

Safe Materials: Crafted from BPA-free plastic, ensuring safety for both mother and baby.

Easy to Clean: Simple to wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Dishwasher, fridge, and freezer-safe for added convenience.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 6 months. Replace when suction or performance diminishes, or after extensive use and sterilization.

Inserts (15, 17, 19, 21mm, 2 Pcs)

Compatibility: Works with eufy Wearable Breast Pump E10, E20, S1, and S1 Pro models.

Sizing Guide: Refer to our sizing guide provided in your eufy Breast Pump Kit to find the perfect fit for optimal comfort. Nipple size may change throughout different stages of breastfeeding, requiring adjustments in flange inserts.

Safe Material: Made from food-grade, soft silicone for safety and comfort.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance decreases with use, sterilization, or based on your individual needs.

Available in sizes 15mm, 17mm, 19mm and 21mm.

Flange for S1/S1 Pro, E20 (24mm/27mm, 2 Pcs)

Replacement or spare set of flange for your S1 or S1 Pro, E20 breast pumps. Experience soothing warmth during pumping sessions with our innovative HeatFlow technology.

Compatibility: Specifically designed for use with the Eufy Breast Pump S1 or S1 Pro, E20.

Easy to Clean: Simply wash with warm, soapy water and rinse thoroughly after each use. Safe for dishwasher, fridge, and freezer use for quick and easy cleaning.

Soft Silicone: Made with durable silicone, the flange provides strong suction while keeping the milk collector securely sealed.

Comfy Fit: Ergonomically designed for a comfortable, secure fit, ensuring a pleasant pumping experience.

Lifespan: Typically lasts up to 3 months. Replace if suction or performance diminishes with regular use and sterilization, or based on your individual needs.

Cleaning Brush (1-Pack)

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Cleaning Brush*1

Customized for eufy Breast Pumps: Designed to reach every corner of your breast pump, this brush ensures thorough cleaning.

Safe and Durable: The brush head is crafted from durable, food-grade PP+ material to ensure both safety and longevity.

Versatile Use: Ideal for cleaning nipples, squeeze tops, and sippy cups of all shapes and sizes. Compact and strong enough to clean small parts. Gentle on soft materials.

S1/S1 Pro/E20 Container - 2pcs

Compatibility: Only compatible with eufy Breast Pump S1 / S1 Pro / E20.

Safe Materials: Made from BPA-free plastic materials, safe for mother and baby.

Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. Dishwasher, fridge, and freezer-safe for quick and easy cleaning.

Lifespan: Typically lasts 6 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

Duckbill Valve - 4pcs

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro.

Closed, Anti-Blackflow Design: Designed to prevent backflow of breast milk and help direct milk to the bottom of the container, ensuring no loss of suction. The slit on the valve tips remains closed when not pumping.

Food-Grade Silicone: Made from durable, BPA-free, food-grade silicone, the duckbill valves are soft, odorless, and skin-friendly for both mother and baby. The snug fit offers comfort and efficient pumping.

Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. To deep clean, use boiling water or steam at no more than 100℃ (212℉) for 5-10 minutes. Avoid hard brushes; use fingertips instead.

Lifespan: Typically lasts 1-3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Spout Cap - 4pcs

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro.

Prevents Leaks from the Top: Features a spill-proof valve to help prevent messy spills and keep things clean.

Safety First: Made from food-grade silicone, the spout cap that comes into contact with breast milk ensures safety and gives you peace of mind about your baby's milk.

Lifespan: Typically lasts 3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Dust Cover - 2pcs

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro.

Safe Material: Our dust cover is made from food-grade plastic.

Keeps the Flange Clean: Safeguards your milk from spills and contaminants with the silicone breast pump dust cover. Its snug fit ensures reliable, spill-proof protection.

Universal Compatibility: Designed to fit all eufy Breast Pump models, this dust cover is a versatile and essential accessory.

One-Piece Lid Design: Made from food-grade plastic, our lightweight and flexible breast pump dust cover is easy to handle and durable for repeated use.

Easy to Clean: Wash with warm, soapy water and rinse well after each use. To sterilize, boil in water or steam.

Lifespan: Typically lasts 6 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

S1/S1Pro Magnet Charging Cable - 1pc

Compatibility: Only compatible with eufy Breast Pump S1 / S1 Pro.

Charge Two at Once: Charge two breast pumps simultaneously with this magnetic charging cable. Enjoy the streamlined process without having to look for multiple charging ports.

Hassle-Free Magnetic Charging: Ensures a hands-free, tangle-free, quick, and easy recharge.

Ideal for Work and Travel: Easily fits into your briefcase, purse, backpack, or suitcase, making it perfect for the office or trips out of town.

1-Year Lifespan: Durable for one-year use.

E10/E20/S1/S1 Pro Diaphragm (2pcs)

Compatibility: Compatible with eufy Breast Pump E10 / E20 / S1 / S1 Pro.

  1. Food-Grade Silicone: Made from food-grade silicone, the diaphragm is safe for both mother and baby and durable for repeated use and sterilization.
  2. Flexible and Durable:The silicone material offers the flexibility needed to maintain a steady suction while being robust enough to withstand wear and tear over time.
  3. Easy to Clean: The smooth surface allows for effortless cleaning and sterilization.
  4. Guaranteed Reliability: eufy breast pump accessories are covered by a 90-day limited manufacturer's warranty.
  5. Typically lasts 1-3 months. Replace if suction and performance decrease with use and sterilization, or based on your usage.

page_json.name: Eufy Breast Pump Accessories
page_json.description: Comprehensive Eufy Breast Pump Accessories set includes various flanges, containers, and charging cables for optimal comfort and convenience during breastfeeding. The HeatFlow™ Flange24mm and MagnetCharging Cable enhance pumping efficiency and ease of use for new mothers. - Lazada

title: Momcozy M9 Breast Pump Accessory Set Duckbill Valve Diaphragm Flange Baby Bottle Silicone Material Electric Type for Mothers
detail_text: Compatibility Designed specifically for Momcozy M9 breast pump, ensuring seamless integration and optimal performance. Ease of Use and Cleaning These parts are easy to use and clean, making maintenance a breeze. Simply wash with soap and water or steam clean at 100°C. Leakproof Design Silicone diaphragm prevents leakage, while the silicone duckbill valve prevents backflow, keeping your milk secure. Efficiency Crafted to match the efficiency of original parts, this kit helps maximize your pumping experience. Food-Grade Silicone Made from soft, food-grade silicone, these parts are durable, BPA-free, and safe for long-term use.
detail_html:
Compatibility



Designed specifically for Momcozy M9 breast pump, ensuring seamless integration and optimal performance.






Ease of Use and Cleaning



These parts are easy to use and clean, making maintenance a breeze. Simply wash with soap and water or steam clean at 100°C.






Leakproof Design



Silicone diaphragm prevents leakage, while the silicone duckbill valve prevents backflow, keeping your milk secure.






Efficiency



Crafted to match the efficiency of original parts, this kit helps maximize your pumping experience.






Food-Grade Silicone



Made from soft, food-grade silicone, these parts are durable, BPA-free, and safe for long-term use.

detail_blocks.text: Compatibility Designed specifically for Momcozy M9 breast pump, ensuring seamless integration and optimal performance. Ease of Use and Cleaning These parts are easy to use and clean, making maintenance a breeze. Simply wash with soap and water or steam clean at 100°C. Leakproof Design Silicone diaphragm prevents leakage, while the silicone duckbill valve prevents backflow, keeping your milk secure. Efficiency Crafted to match the efficiency of original parts, this kit helps maximize your pumping experience. Food-Grade Silicone Made from soft, food-grade silicone, these parts are durable, BPA-free, and safe for long-term use.

product.desc:
Compatibility



Designed specifically for Momcozy M9 breast pump, ensuring seamless integration and optimal performance.






Ease of Use and Cleaning



These parts are easy to use and clean, making maintenance a breeze. Simply wash with soap and water or steam clean at 100°C.






Leakproof Design



Silicone diaphragm prevents leakage, while the silicone duckbill valve prevents backflow, keeping your milk secure.






Efficiency



Crafted to match the efficiency of original parts, this kit helps maximize your pumping experience.






Food-Grade Silicone



Made from soft, food-grade silicone, these parts are durable, BPA-free, and safe for long-term use.

page_json.description: <html> <head></head> <body>  Compatibility   Designed specifically for Momcozy M9 breast pump, ensuring seamless integration and optimal performance.    Ease of Use and Cleaning   These parts are easy to use and clean, making maintenance a breeze. Simply wash with soap and water or steam clean at 100°C.    Leakproof Design   Silicone diaphragm prevents leakage, while the silicone duckbill valve prevents backflow, keeping your milk secure.    Efficiency   Crafted to match the efficiency of original parts, this kit helps maximize your pumping experience.    Food-Grade Silicone   Made from soft, food-grade silicone, these parts are durable, BPA-free, and safe for long-term use.     </body></html>

title: Cubble Breast Pump Flange 15-32mm (18 sizes) Accessories Wide Neck Breast Shield for Spectra /Maymom
seller_name: Baby Essentials by First Few Years
detail_text: Cubble Breast Pump Flange is compatible with - All Spectra pumps (S1/S2/M/9+/Dual Compact/Synergy Gold S) and older Spectra breast pumps (Dew 350, 360) - All Medela pumps except Swing Maxi, FreeStyle and Harmony. Connects directly to Spectra backflow protector; no need for yellow flange adaptor! Our flange is compatible only with wide-neck milk bottles (e.g., Spectra, Philips Avent, etc.). Some bottles may require an additional bottle gasket for a secure fit. Please note that it is not compatible with Medela narrow-neck bottles. - Made from PP material - BPA free - Steam safe - Autoclaveable - Available in 18 Sizes: 15mm to 32mm
detail_html:
Cubble Breast Pump Flange is compatible with

- All Spectra pumps (S1/S2/M/9+/Dual Compact/Synergy Gold S) and older Spectra breast pumps (Dew 350, 360)

- All Medela pumps except Swing Maxi, FreeStyle and Harmony.

Connects directly to Spectra backflow protector; no need for yellow flange adaptor!

Our flange is compatible only with wide-neck milk bottles (e.g., Spectra, Philips Avent, etc.). Some bottles may require an additional bottle gasket for a secure fit. Please note that it is not compatible with Medela narrow-neck bottles.

- Made from PP material

- BPA free

- Steam safe

- Autoclaveable

- Available in 18 Sizes: 15mm to 32mm

product.desc:
Cubble Breast Pump Flange is compatible with

- All Spectra pumps (S1/S2/M/9+/Dual Compact/Synergy Gold S) and older Spectra breast pumps (Dew 350, 360)

- All Medela pumps except Swing Maxi, FreeStyle and Harmony.

Connects directly to Spectra backflow protector; no need for yellow flange adaptor!

Our flange is compatible only with wide-neck milk bottles (e.g., Spectra, Philips Avent, etc.). Some bottles may require an additional bottle gasket for a secure fit. Please note that it is not compatible with Medela narrow-neck bottles.

- Made from PP material

- BPA free

- Steam safe

- Autoclaveable

- Available in 18 Sizes: 15mm to 32mm
product.highlights:
• Compatible with All Spectra pumps (S1/S2/M/9+/Dual Compact/Synergy Gold S) and older Spectra breast pumps (Dew 350, 360)
  • Compatible with All Medela pumps except Swing Maxi, FreeStyle and Harmony.
  • Connects directly to Spectra backflow protector; no need for yellow flange adaptor!
  • Our flange is compatible only with wide-neck milk bottles (e.g., Spectra, Philips Avent, etc.).
  • Please note that it is not compatible with Medela narrow-neck bottles.
  • Made from PP material
  • BPA free
  • Steam safe
  • Autoclaveable
  • Available in 18 Sizes: 15mm to 32mm

page_json.name: Cubble Breast Pump Flange 15-32mm (18 sizes) Accessories Wide Neck Breast Shield for Spectra /Maymom
page_json.description: Cubble Breast Pump Flange offers 18 sizes from 15mm to 32mm, compatible with Spectra and Maymom pumps. Made of BPA-free PP material, this wide-neck breast shield is steam-safe and autoclavable, ensuring a comfortable and hygienic breastfeeding experience. - Lazada

title: MAYLATI Durable Silicone Nipple Ruler Soft Safe Breast Pump Measure Accessories Skin-friendly Nipple Measuring Card Mother
detail_text: Please align our silicone nipple measuring tool ruler 0 with the edge of the nipple side, observe the nipple size by looking in the mirror It has 21 circle sizes and is very soft, which can quickly help new mothers determine the right breast pump. This nipple ruler is made of silicone, which is soft, safe, non-toxic, comfortable, and provides all-round protection. When a new mother uses it, there is no pain and no worry about scratching the skin, and it can be bent and folded without worrying Of course, these two types of rulers can also be used for other purposes, such as: drawing circles, daily necessities measurement. Package Included: 1 x Silicone Nipple Ruler + 1 x Flange Ruler Note: No retail package. Transition: 1cm=10mm=0.39inch Please allow 0-1cm error due to manual measurement. pls make sure you do not mind before you bid. Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thank you!

title: Spectra Breast Pump Accessories
detail_text: Spectra Premium Breast Shield Set Compatible with all Spectra pumps Set inclusive of: Spectra 24/28mm Breast Shield x1 Spectra Tubing x1 Spectra Backflow Protector x1 Spectra White Valve x1 Spectra Wide Neck Bottle x1 Price stated is ONLY for 1 Set, please add two time if you need a pair. Spectra White Valve (Pair) Compatible with all Spectra pumps Not advisable to sterilize due to its rubber material Will affect suction of the breast pump with wear and tear (Please note that there is a slothole at the tip of each valve. It is part of the valve and NOT a defect.) Wash with liquid cleanser and rinse thoroughly Do not wash it with straw brush Do not detach from the breastshield by pulling from the end Spectra Tubing Compatible for all Spectra Breast Pumps Not advisable to sterilize MUST dry thoroughly after every wash Spectra Backflow Protector (New) This new version prevents milk from flowing to the pump by 99.99% The new membrane encase the cover while the cover caps together to secure Part connecting to spectra breast shield is fragile. When slotting into spectra breast shield, too tight will result in difficulties pulling out. Please secure into spectra breast shield, not all the way in. Can replace the membrane inside Spectra Manual Switch Kit To be attached to spectra breast shield to function as a manual pump. Spectra Silicone Massager Malleable silicon insert sits inside the shield to serve as a cushions for the breast, making expressing more comfortable. Soft petal design on the silicone, helps to massage the breast tissue, encouraging milk flow. Fit Spectra 28mm Breast Shield Spectra Wide Neck PP Milk Bottles (Pack of 2) Wide neck bottles without teat Come with lids and caps, so that they can be used both for milk storage and feeding Capacity 160ml Made of 100% food grade polypropylene (PP) for safe & longer storage Spectra Wide to Standard Bottle Adaptor Spectra Wide to Standard Bottle Adaptor is a converts wide neck flanges (e.g. Spectra) to standard neck bottles (e.g. Medela) Please note that not all standard neck bottles are compatible due to the different threads on the bottles that may not fit the breast shield. Price stated is ONLY for 1 piece, please add two time if you need a pair Spectra Bottle Stand Bottle stand for Spectra wide neck bottles. (Wide Neck Bottle With Pink Collar) To keep bottle upright and prevent the bottle from tipping over
detail_html:
Spectra Premium Breast Shield Set

  • Compatible with all Spectra pumps

Set inclusive of:

  • Spectra 24/28mm Breast Shield x1
  • Spectra Tubing x1
  • Spectra Backflow Protector x1
  • Spectra White Valve x1
  • Spectra Wide Neck Bottle x1

Price stated is ONLY for 1 Set, please add two time if you need a pair. 

Spectra White Valve (Pair)

  • Compatible with all Spectra pumps
  • Not advisable to sterilize due to its rubber material
  • Will affect suction of the breast pump with wear and tear (Please note that there is a slothole at the tip of each valve. It is part of the valve and NOT a defect.)
  • Wash with liquid cleanser and rinse thoroughly
  • Do not wash it with straw brush
  • Do not detach from the breastshield by pulling from the end

Spectra Tubing

  • Compatible for all Spectra Breast Pumps
  • Not advisable to sterilize
  • MUST dry thoroughly after every wash

Spectra Backflow Protector (New)

  • This new version prevents milk from flowing to the pump by 99.99%
  • The new membrane encase the cover while the cover caps together to secure
  • Part connecting to spectra breast shield is fragile. When slotting into spectra breast shield, too tight will result in difficulties pulling out. Please secure into spectra breast shield, not all the way in.
  • Can replace the membrane inside

Spectra Manual Switch Kit

  • To be attached to spectra breast shield to function as a manual pump.

Spectra Silicone Massager

  • Malleable silicon insert sits inside the shield to serve as a cushions for the breast, making expressing more comfortable.
  • Soft petal design on the silicone, helps to massage the breast tissue, encouraging milk flow. 
  • Fit Spectra 28mm Breast Shield

Spectra Wide Neck PP Milk Bottles (Pack of 2)

  • Wide neck bottles without teat
  • Come with lids and caps, so that they can be used both for milk storage and feeding
  • Capacity 160ml
  • Made of 100% food grade polypropylene (PP) for safe & longer storage

Spectra Wide to Standard Bottle Adaptor

  • Spectra Wide to Standard Bottle Adaptor is a converts wide neck flanges (e.g. Spectra) to standard neck bottles (e.g. Medela)
  • Please note that not all standard neck bottles are compatible due to the different threads on the bottles that may not fit the breast shield.

Price stated is ONLY for 1 piece, please add two time if you need a pair

Spectra Bottle Stand

  • Bottle stand for Spectra wide neck bottles. (Wide Neck Bottle With Pink Collar)
  • To keep bottle upright and prevent the bottle from tipping over

aiTexts: This Spectra Breast Pump Accessories set enhances your breastfeeding experience.
Compatibility: Designed for double electric breast pumps, ensuring optimal performance.
Key Features: Includes various sizes of breast shields for comfort and efficiency.
Convenience: Easy to assemble and clean, making pumping hassle-free.
Usage: Perfect for daily use at home or on-the-go, supporting busy moms.
Safety: Made from BPA-free materials, ensuring safe feeding for your baby.

  • Compatible with all Spectra pumps

Set inclusive of:

  • Spectra 24/28mm Breast Shield x1
  • Spectra Tubing x1
  • Spectra Backflow Protector x1
  • Spectra White Valve x1

Price stated is ONLY for 1 Set, please add two time if you need a pair. 

Spectra White Valve (Pair)

  • Compatible with all Spectra pumps
  • Not advisable to sterilize due to its rubber material
  • Will affect suction of the breast pump with wear and tear (Please note that there is a slothole at the tip of each valve. It is part of the valve and NOT a defect.)
  • Wash with liquid cleanser and rinse thoroughly
  • Do not wash it with straw brush
  • Do not detach from the breastshield by pulling from the end

Spectra Tubing

  • Compatible for all Spectra Breast Pumps
  • Not advisable to sterilize
  • MUST dry thoroughly after every wash

Spectra Backflow Protector (New)

  • This new version prevents milk from flowing to the pump by 99.99%
  • The new membrane encase the cover while the cover caps together to secure
  • Part connecting to spectra breast shield is fragile. When slotting into spectra breast shield, too tight will result in difficulties pulling out. Please secure into spectra breast shield, not all the way in.
  • Can replace the membrane inside

Spectra Manual Switch Kit

  • To be attached to spectra breast shield to function as a manual pump.

Spectra Silicone Massager

  • Malleable silicon insert sits inside the shield to serve as a cushions for the breast, making expressing more comfortable.
  • Soft petal design on the silicone, helps to massage the breast tissue, encouraging milk flow.

Spectra Wide Neck PP Milk Bottles (Pack of 2)

page_json.name: Spectra Breast Pump Accessories
page_json.description: Diverse Spectra Double Electric Breast Pump Accessories for optimal breastfeeding. Includes silicone massager, multiple shields, manual kit, and backflow protector, ensuring a comprehensive set for various attachments. - Lazada

title: Horigen 3D Breast Pump Kit for All brand Replacement Parts breast pump accessories 21mm 25mm (2pcs)
detail_text: Natural 3D breastfeeding feeling,100% food grade silicone; BPA free, no plasticizer.3D PAINLESS PUMPING BREAST PUMP KIT Product Description:1. Soft comfortable 3D liquid silicone shieldHorigen breast pump kit is made from soft and food grade liquid silicone flange which is similar as baby’s mouth. The lips adsorbing on the breast, the palate and tongue alternatively squeezing and stretching the nipple to stimulate lactation, which brings mother the natural feeling of breastfeeding. It is more comfortable than hard plastic flange from other brands. 2. Suitable for ALL brand pump MachineSuitable for Most of brand pump Machine (like Spectra , Medela ,MUIFA ,Zeus, Ele ,Real Bubee, Bebeta ,cmbear ,Doopser,Plextone ,Wisemom,Philips Avent ,Huppy Buppy,Phanpy...more ...)3. BPA free and closed system, Less parts and easy to clean.All parts of the pump are made from food grade material and do not contain BPA and any hazardous content. The pump is a closed system pump. The milk never flow back into the tubing and pump motor. Meanwhile, it contains few parts and each part is easy to clean.4. 3 size for you to choose3D breast pump kit have three size for you to choose :21mm,25mm,29mm . Suitable for all mother5. can be steam sterilized and boiling water sterilized. kindly reminderAll accessories that come into contact with breast milk need to be disinfected daily, recommended to replace them every 3 months.Wish you a wonderful breastfeeding journey. Contact us to solve all your questions !

Product Description:1. Soft comfortable 3D liquid silicone shieldHorigen breast pump kit is made from soft and food grade liquid silicone flange which is similar as baby’s mouth. The lips adsorbing on the breast, the palate and tongue alternatively squeezing and stretching the nipple to stimulate lactation, which brings mother the natural feeling of breastfeeding. It is more comfortable than hard plastic flange from other brands. 2. title: Breast Pump Flange Insert Kit for Momcozy/Spectra S1/S2, Eufy/Medela/Elvie/Lansinoh/Paruu Breast Pump Wearable Pumps
detail_text: 【11 Size Options&Customized Comfort】: Our flange insert is available in an extensive range of 11 standardized sizes(12mm-22mm available), designed to accommodate evolving dimensional requirements throughout different breastfeeding stages.Reduces standard 24mm nipple tunnel to custom sizes, preventing painful friction during breastfeeding. ( tips:If you are not sure about your size, please choose our 10PCS Flange Inserts so that you can pick the right size for yourself.) 【Wide Compatibility】: Our flange sizing kit are suitable for almost all breast pumps, Compatible for Momcozy m9/m6/m5/S12 pro/ V1 pro/V2 pro, also available for Spectra/Medela/eufy/TSRETE/Lasionh/Nuliie/NCVI/Paruu/NaNaLazy/MOMMED wearable breast pump,Reduce 24mm Nipple Tunnel Down to correct size. 【Enhanced pumping efficiency】: These soft silicone flange inserts are designed to minimize discomfort while maximizing milk output. The comfortable and soft silicone material is designed to stimulate milk flow and increase comfort during use.With the added benefits of reduced pain and increased milk output, Achieve enhanced breast pumping, reduce pumping time, and maximize milk production by using the essential flange inserts for your breast pump. 【Food-grade Silicone】: The breast pump flange inserts are made from transparent food-grade silicone,BPA-free, touch-soft, skill-friendly, ensuring the safety of both you and your baby. The soft-touch material provides a snug fit, promoting efficient pumping without causing irritation or discomfort. 【Easy To Use & Clean】: Wash parts after each use with warm soapy water and rinse well. Please use boiling water/steam, with a temperature of around 100°C (212°F). Tips: The nipple size is different during different breastfeeding periods, it is suggested that moms use a new Flange insert every 1-2 months.

aiTexts: This Breast Pump Flange Insert Kit offers 11 size options (12mm-22mm) to ensure customized comfort throughout different breastfeeding stages.
Compatible with most breast pumps including Momcozy, Spectra, Medela, Eufy, Lansinoh, Elvie, Paruu, and more, reducing the standard 24mm nipple tunnel to the correct size.
Made from transparent, food-grade, BPA-free silicone that is soft and safe for both mom and baby, minimizing discomfort during pumping.
Enhances pumping efficiency by stimulating milk flow, reducing pain, and maximizing milk output.
Easy to clean with warm soapy water and sterilize by boiling or steaming. Use a new flange every 1-2 months for best results.

title: imani i2Plus Pro Breast Pump Accessories
detail_text: imani Collection Cup Pro The imani Collection Cup Pro is one part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement if needed. Built for durability and easy use, it ensures continued comfort and efficiency in your pumping routine. With a silicone double seal coupled with a tear-resistant valve, it reduces leaks and outlasts traditional duckbill valves, providing durability for your daily pumping routine. Product does not come with funnel. Only compatible with the imani Funnel Pro. Material Valve: LSR Silicone Protector: LSR Silicone Cup: Polyamide (PA) Product Care Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher imani Funnel Pro – 25mm/28mm The imani Funnel Pro is the one essential part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement when needed. Made for a comfortable, secure fit, it ensures efficient milk expression while maintaining the convenience and simplicity of the hands-free design. For those who find the 25mm funnel not quite the right fit, the 28mm funnel offers a larger size for a more comfortable and secure fit. Product does not come with collection cup. Only compatible with the imani Collection Cup Pro. Material Funnel: Polypropylene (PP) Product Care Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher imani Handsfree Cap Pro The imani Handsfree Cap Pro allows you to connect the imani Handsfree Cup Pro to the imani iBox or other brands of electrical breast pump.
detail_html:
imani Collection Cup Pro

The imani Collection Cup Pro is one part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement if needed. Built for durability and easy use, it ensures continued comfort and efficiency in your pumping routine.

With a silicone double seal coupled with a tear-resistant valve, it reduces leaks and outlasts traditional duckbill valves, providing durability for your daily pumping routine.

Product does not come with funnel. Only compatible with the imani Funnel Pro.

Material

  • Valve: LSR Silicone
  • Protector: LSR Silicone
  • Cup: Polyamide (PA)

Product Care

Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher

imani Funnel Pro – 25mm/28mm

The imani Funnel Pro is the one essential part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement when needed. Made for a comfortable, secure fit, it ensures efficient milk expression while maintaining the convenience and simplicity of the hands-free design.

For those who find the 25mm funnel not quite the right fit, the 28mm funnel offers a larger size for a more comfortable and secure fit.

Product does not come with collection cup. Only compatible with the imani Collection Cup Pro.

Material

  • Funnel: Polypropylene (PP)

Product Care

Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher

imani Handsfree Cap Pro

The imani Handsfree Cap Pro allows you to connect the imani Handsfree Cup Pro to the imani iBox or other brands of electrical breast pump.

title: imani Accessories for imani breastpump (i1plus, i2, i2plus, ibox)
detail_text: imani Accessories 1. Valve - 2pcs ﻿imani Valves are replacement valves for Imani Breast Pumps. Due to frequent use, valves need to be replaced regularly due to wear and tear. *Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed. 2. Silicone Ring - 2pcs imani silicon ring for imani i2 breast pump or imani handsfree cup 3. Backflow Protector - 2pcs imani Backflow Protector is the membrane to fit to imani electrical breast pumps. It is advisable to replace this regularly to optimise the performance of your breastpump due to wear and tear. *Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed. 4. Inserts - 2pcs imani flange inserts is a pack of 2 flange inserts that can be placed inside imani breast pumps to reduce the nipple flange size to your preferred size. *Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed. 4 sizes to choose from 17mm / 19mm / 21mm / 25mm 5. Handsfree cap - 2pcs imani Handsfree Cap allows you to connect the Imani Handsfree Cup to other brands of electrical breastpump. 6. Silicone Flange - 25mm / 28mm / 32mm - 1pc **ONLY compatible to clear cup for i2 and i2+** imani Handsfree Silicone Funnel is a breast shield for the handsfree cup. This handsfree cup can be used to connect with Imani i2 & i2+ electrical breast pump. This is suitable for mummies with bigger nipple size who are unable to fit into the standard size of 25mm and 28mm flanges that are provided together with the purchase of i2 or handsfree cup set. 3 sizes to choose from 25mm / 28mm / 32mm 7. Milk Collection Bottle (4 bottles) – It is compatible with Imani Breast Shield and does not require an adapter – There is no BPA/DEHP in the bottle – Bottle can hold up to 5OZ. – Suitable for refrigerators and freezers – It does not include nipples – Bottle, Bottle Cap: PP / Sealing Disc: Silicone – Includes: Bottle, Bottle cap, Sealing disc 8. Breast Shield Set - 24mm/28mm – Replace the original part or store an additional set with imani breast shield set. – For dual pumping, please purchase two. (Imani recommends replacing parts every 3-6months for optimal use.) – Breast Shield: Made of PP – Protector Cap: Made of PP – Valve, Protector: Made of Silicone – 1 set includes Breast Shield×1, Protector Cap×1, Valve×1, and Protector × 1 – Available in size: 24mm / 28mm 9. C-type charging cable - 1pc in the box - suitable for i2 imani breast pump 10. Air Hose Hub and Tube, 1 piece Use these tubing to attach your imani handsfree cups to imani i1, imani i1+, or to a non-imani breast pump motor. Can be used as a single tubing or double tubing. 11. imani Milk Collection Cup PA - i2plus cup for your liquid gold. 12. imani Connector PA, 1pc - Connector from the cup to the motor Use with imani breast pump. *Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.
detail_html:
imani Accessories

1. Valve - 2pcs

﻿imani Valves are replacement valves for Imani Breast Pumps. Due to frequent use, valves need to be replaced regularly due to wear and tear.

*Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.

2. Silicone Ring - 2pcs

imani silicon ring for imani i2 breast pump or imani handsfree cup

3. Backflow Protector - 2pcs

imani Backflow Protector is the membrane to fit to imani electrical breast pumps. It is advisable to replace this regularly to optimise the performance of your breastpump due to wear and tear.

*Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.

4. Inserts - 2pcs

imani flange inserts is a pack of 2 flange inserts that can be placed inside imani breast pumps to reduce the nipple flange size to your preferred size.

*Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.

4 sizes to choose from

17mm / 19mm / 21mm / 25mm

5. Handsfree cap - 2pcs

imani Handsfree Cap allows you to connect the Imani Handsfree Cup to other brands of electrical breastpump.

6. Silicone Flange - 25mm / 28mm / 32mm - 1pc

**ONLY compatible to clear cup for i2 and i2+**

imani Handsfree Silicone Funnel is a breast shield for the handsfree cup.

This handsfree cup can be used to connect with Imani i2 & i2+ electrical breast pump.

This is suitable for mummies with bigger nipple size who are unable to fit into the standard size of 25mm and 28mm flanges that are provided together with the purchase of i2 or handsfree cup set.

3 sizes to choose from

25mm / 28mm / 32mm

7. Milk Collection Bottle (4 bottles)

– It is compatible with Imani Breast Shield and does not require an adapter

– There is no BPA/DEHP in the bottle

– Bottle can hold up to 5OZ.

– Suitable for refrigerators and freezers

– It does not include nipples

– Bottle, Bottle Cap: PP / Sealing Disc: Silicone

– Includes: Bottle, Bottle cap, Sealing disc

8. Breast Shield Set - 24mm/28mm

– Replace the original part or store an additional set with imani breast shield set.

– For dual pumping, please purchase two. (Imani recommends replacing parts every 3-6months for optimal use.)

– Breast Shield: Made of PP

– Protector Cap: Made of PP

– Valve, Protector: Made of Silicone

– 1 set includes Breast Shield×1, Protector Cap×1, Valve×1, and Protector × 1

– Available in size: 24mm / 28mm

9. C-type charging cable

- 1pc in the box

- suitable for i2 imani breast pump

10. Air Hose Hub and Tube, 1 piece

Use these tubing to attach your imani handsfree cups to imani i1, imani i1+, or to a non-imani breast pump motor.

Can be used as a single tubing or double tubing.

11. imani Milk Collection Cup PA

- i2plus cup for your liquid gold.

12. imani Connector PA, 1pc - Connector from the cup to the motor

Use with imani breast pump.

*Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.

product.desc:
imani Accessories

1. Valve - 2pcs

﻿imani Valves are replacement valves for Imani Breast Pumps. Due to frequent use, valves need to be replaced regularly due to wear and tear.

*Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.

2. Silicone Ring - 2pcs

imani silicon ring for imani i2 breast pump or imani handsfree cup

3. Backflow Protector - 2pcs

imani Backflow Protector is the membrane to fit to imani electrical breast pumps. It is advisable to replace this regularly to optimise the performance of your breastpump due to wear and tear.

*Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.

4. Inserts - 2pcs

imani flange inserts is a pack of 2 flange inserts that can be placed inside imani breast pumps to reduce the nipple flange size to your preferred size.

*Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.

4 sizes to choose from

17mm / 19mm / 21mm / 25mm

5. Handsfree cap - 2pcs

imani Handsfree Cap allows you to connect the Imani Handsfree Cup to other brands of electrical breastpump.

6. Silicone Flange - 25mm / 28mm / 32mm - 1pc

**ONLY compatible to clear cup for i2 and i2+**

imani Handsfree Silicone Funnel is a breast shield for the handsfree cup.

This handsfree cup can be used to connect with Imani i2 & i2+ electrical breast pump.

This is suitable for mummies with bigger nipple size who are unable to fit into the standard size of 25mm and 28mm flanges that are provided together with the purchase of i2 or handsfree cup set.

3 sizes to choose from

25mm / 28mm / 32mm

7. Milk Collection Bottle (4 bottles)

– It is compatible with Imani Breast Shield and does not require an adapter

– There is no BPA/DEHP in the bottle

– Bottle can hold up to 5OZ.

– Suitable for refrigerators and freezers

– It does not include nipples

– Bottle, Bottle Cap: PP / Sealing Disc: Silicone

– Includes: Bottle, Bottle cap, Sealing disc

8. Breast Shield Set - 24mm/28mm

– Replace the original part or store an additional set with imani breast shield set.

– For dual pumping, please purchase two. (Imani recommends replacing parts every 3-6months for optimal use.)

– Breast Shield: Made of PP

– Protector Cap: Made of PP

– Valve, Protector: Made of Silicone

– 1 set includes Breast Shield×1, Protector Cap×1, Valve×1, and Protector × 1

– Available in size: 24mm / 28mm

9. C-type charging cable

- 1pc in the box

- suitable for i2 imani breast pump

10. Air Hose Hub and Tube, 1 piece

Use these tubing to attach your imani handsfree cups to imani i1, imani i1+, or to a non-imani breast pump motor.

Can be used as a single tubing or double tubing.

11. imani Milk Collection Cup PA

- i2plus cup for your liquid gold.

12. imani Connector PA, 1pc - Connector from the cup to the motor

Use with imani breast pump.

*Note: As it is a hygiene item, exchange/return is not allowed.

product.highlights:
• Youha Spare Accessories for Ava/INs Gen 2 Breast Pump
  • Funnel inserts - used to reduce breast sizing:
  • 18-22mm funnel inserts fits a 24mm breast shield only
  • 26mm funnel insert fit a 28mm breast shield only
  • Breast Shield - pick the correct size for excellent fit, comfort and better performance
  • Cup bowl - (includes 1x ) spares are great to keep at work place/for travelling
  • Valves - important to repalce to keep breat pump working in best condition
  • Users are encouraged to replace their breast pump parts every 2-6 months
  • Spare accessories only. Breast pump not included.
product.title: Youha Spare Accessories for Ava/INs Gen 2 Breast Pump

title: Jevonbaby Breast Pump Valves (2-Pieces per Box)
detail_text: Jevonbaby Valve is designed to ensure that milk only flows into the bottle or milk storage bag and prevents backflow, keeping your pumping journey smooth and reliable. BPA free and UV sterilization friendly. Exclusively for use with the Jevonbaby wearable breast pump. (Optimal performance is key when it comes to your breast pump accessories. Over time, normal wear and tear can affect suction and output, which is why it's advisable to replace your Jevonbaby pump parts every three months. This routine maintenance ensures that your pump continues to operate at its best, providing efficient and reliable performance.) PRODUCT SPECIFICATION Material: BPA Free Silicone Recommendation: Replace every 3 months WHAT’S INCLUDED IN IN THE BOX? 2 x Valves per Box

title: MEDELA Handsfree Membrane, 2-Pack
detail_text: 【Medela Freestyle™ Hands-Free Membrane】 Hands-free membranes are extra membranes for your Medela Hands-free collection cups - now also available with your Medela Hands-free breast pump. Be sure to examine your pump parts regularly, if you notice damage or extensive wear replace immediately. Medela recommends replacing your membranes every 3 – 6 months, depending on your pumping frequency. 【Product Highlights】 🟡 Medela Authentic Spare Parts: Quality and performance you can trust: Great as a spare or replacement. 🟡 Made without BPA: Safe for you and baby. 🟡 100% food grade silicone 📍Please note – the Hands-free membranes are not compatible with Medela’s PersonalFit Flex™ pump sets parts. 📍Authentic Medela Pump Accessories: Medela offers replacement membranes tested and designed to work with your Medela Hands-free Collection Cups that are now also available with your Medela Hands-free breast pump. 📍Be sure to examine your pump parts regularly, if you notice damage or extensive wear replace immediately. Medela recommends replacing your membranes every 3 – 6 months, depending on your pumping frequency. IMPORTANT: Use of pump parts or accessories not designed for your specific breast pump may cause irreversible damage to the product. For that reason, only use the accessories that came with, or are identified by Medela to work with, your specific breast pump model. 【What's in the box?】 2 x Hands-free Silicone Membranes
detail_html:
【Medela Freestyle™ Hands-Free Membrane】

Hands-free membranes are extra membranes for your Medela Hands-free collection cups - now also available with your Medela Hands-free breast pump.

Be sure to examine your pump parts regularly, if you notice damage or extensive wear replace immediately. Medela recommends replacing your membranes every 3 – 6 months, depending on your pumping frequency.

【Product Highlights】

🟡 Medela Authentic Spare Parts: Quality and performance you can trust: Great as a spare or replacement.

🟡 Made without BPA: Safe for you and baby.

🟡 100% food grade silicone

📍Please note – the Hands-free membranes are not compatible with Medela’s PersonalFit Flex™ pump sets parts.

📍Authentic Medela Pump Accessories: Medela offers replacement membranes tested and designed to work with your Medela Hands-free Collection Cups that are now also available with your Medela Hands-free breast pump.

📍Be sure to examine your pump parts regularly, if you notice damage or extensive wear replace immediately. Medela recommends replacing your membranes every 3 – 6 months, depending on your pumping frequency.

IMPORTANT: Use of pump parts or accessories not designed for your specific breast pump may cause irreversible damage to the product. For that reason, only use the accessories that came with, or are identified by Medela to work with, your specific breast pump model.

【What's in the box?】

2 x Hands-free Silicone Membranes

Medela recommends replacing your membranes every 3 – 6 months, depending on your pumping frequency. 【Product Highlights】 🟡 Medela Authentic Spare Parts: Quality and performance you can trust: Great as a spare or replacement. 🟡 Made without BPA: Safe for you and baby. 🟡 100% food grade silicone 📍Please note – the Hands-free membranes are not compatible with Medela’s PersonalFit Flex™ pump sets parts. 📍Authentic Medela Pump Accessories: Medela offers replacement membranes tested and designed to work with your Medela Hands-free Collection Cups that are now also available with your Medela Hands-free breast pump. 📍Be sure to examine your pump parts regularly, if you notice damage or extensive wear replace immediately. Medela recommends replacing your membranes every 3 – 6 months, depending on your pumping frequency. For that reason, only use the accessories that came with, or are identified by Medela to work with, your specific breast pump model. 【What's in the box?】 2 x Hands-free Silicone Membranes

aiTexts: The S39 Breast Pump Accessories Spare Parts are essential for all breastfeeding mothers.
Designed specifically for the S39 and S32 breast pumps, as well as the Cubble C2+, these spare parts ensure a seamless and efficient pumping experience.
The wearable cup flange insert and valve provide a comfortable and secure fit, allowing for hands-free pumping.
With the option for economy delivery, you can conveniently receive these accessories right at your doorstep.
Upgrade your breast pumping routine with these high-quality and reliable spare parts.

title: Spectra Premium 28mm Breastshield Set - For Spectra S1+, 9+, Dual S and Dual Compact
detail_text: Official Store All Spectra products are made in South Korea, and is the leading breast pump brand in Korea. Mothers from all over the World have been enjoying the benefits from Spectra, including mothers from the USA, Australia, UK, Taiwan & Singapore to name a few. Our pumps are safe, hygienic and widely used by Registered Lactation Nurse & National Hospitals. All the pumps come with back flow protection, to prevent milk traveling down the tubing towards the pump. This technology is to prevent a hygiene risk for mould, transmission of viruses and potentially impairing motor function. Besides, all the components that come in touch with milk are BPA-free.

Official Store

product.desc:
Official Store

All Spectra products are made in South Korea, and is the leading breast pump brand in Korea. Mothers from all over the World have been enjoying the benefits from Spectra, including mothers from the USA, Australia, UK, Taiwan & Singapore to name a few.

Our pumps are safe, hygienic and widely used by Registered Lactation Nurse & National Hospitals. All the pumps come with back flow protection, to prevent milk traveling down the tubing towards the pump. This technology is to prevent a hygiene risk for mould, transmission of viruses and potentially impairing motor function. Besides, all the components that come in touch with milk are BPA-free.
product.highlights:
• Set contain 28mm Breast Shield, Tubing, Backflow Protector, Wide Neck Storage Bottle and a Silicone Valve.
  • Compatible with all Spectra Breast Pumps.
  • All plastic parts can be wash and sterilize using UV and Steam.
  • Not recommended to wash or sterilize the Tubing unless milk or water gets in.
  • All parts must be dried before pumping to prevent water from being sucked into the Breast Pump.
  • Not recommended to sterilize the White Silicone parts too frequently as it may cause the Silicone materials to lose their elasticity faster, thus affecting suction.
  • Packaging may differ due to shipping restrictions.

The new SoftSqround flanges are made of soft silicone for best adhesion to skin and has a uniquely designed flange tunnel that is gentle on nipple, making a every session a pump comfortable one. The unique Hegen Sqround shape also allows for mums to adjust angles and find the best fit angle for different breast sizes. title: Spectra Handsfree Valves (Pair) - For Spectra Handsfree Cup Set
detail_text: Official Store All Spectra products are made in South Korea, and is the leading breast pump brand in Korea. Mothers from all over the World have been enjoying the benefits from Spectra, including mothers from the USA, Australia, UK, Taiwan & Singapore to name a few. Our pumps are safe, hygienic and widely used by Registered Lactation Nurse & National Hospitals. All the pumps come with back flow protection, to prevent milk traveling down the tubing towards the pump. This technology is to prevent a hygiene risk for mould, transmission of viruses and potentially impairing motor function. Besides, all the components that come in touch with milk are BPA-free.

title: imani i2Plus Pro Breast Pump Accessories
detail_text: Imani Collection Cup Pro - The imani Collection Cup Pro is one part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement if needed. Built for durability and easy use, it ensures continued comfort and efficiency in your pumping routine. With a silicone double seal coupled with a tear-resistant valve, it reduces leaks and outlasts traditional duckbill valves, providing durability for your daily pumping routine. - Product does not come with funnel. Only compatible with the imani Funnel Pro. - Material: • Valve: LSR Silicone • Protector: LSR Silicone • Cup: Polyamide (PA) • Product Care • Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher - Imani Funnel Pro – 25mm/28mm - The imani Funnel Pro is the one essential part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement when needed. Made for a comfortable, secure fit, it ensures efficient milk expression while maintaining the convenience and simplicity of the hands-free design. For those who find the 25mm funnel not quite the right fit, the 28mm funnel offers a larger size for a more comfortable and secure fit. - Product does not come with collection cup. Only compatible with the imani Collection Cup Pro. - Material: • Funnel: Polypropylene (PP) • Product Care • Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher - Imani Handsfree Cap Pro - The imani Handsfree Cap Pro allows you to connect the imani Handsfree Cup Pro to the imani iBox or other brands of electrical breast pump. -
detail_html:
Imani Collection Cup Pro

-

The imani Collection Cup Pro is one part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement if needed. Built for durability and easy use, it ensures continued comfort and efficiency in your pumping routine.

With a silicone double seal coupled with a tear-resistant valve, it reduces leaks and outlasts traditional duckbill valves, providing durability for your daily pumping routine. 

-

Product does not come with funnel. Only compatible with the imani Funnel Pro.

-

Material:

• Valve: LSR Silicone

• Protector: LSR Silicone

• Cup: Polyamide (PA) 

• Product Care

• Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher 

-

Imani Funnel Pro – 25mm/28mm

-

The imani Funnel Pro is the one essential part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement when needed. Made for a comfortable, secure fit, it ensures efficient milk expression while maintaining the convenience and simplicity of the hands-free design.

For those who find the 25mm funnel not quite the right fit, the 28mm funnel offers a larger size for a more comfortable and secure fit.

-

Product does not come with collection cup. Only compatible with the imani Collection Cup Pro.

-

Material:

• Funnel: Polypropylene (PP)

• Product Care

• Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher 

-

Imani Handsfree Cap Pro

-

The imani Handsfree Cap Pro allows you to connect the imani Handsfree Cup Pro to the imani iBox or other brands of electrical breast pump.

-

title: Medela Quick Clean Breast Pump and Accessory Wipes (30ct Resealable Pack)
detail_text: With Medela Quick Clean breast pump wipes, convenient and portable pump cleaning is easier than ever. No need for soap and water cleaning after each pump session, simply clean your breast pump and accessories with these wipes. Why Quick Clean Wipes: Unscented, alcohol and bleach free Hygienic wipes to remove BM after pumping At home or on the go solution Convenient portable cleaning: Perfect for breast pump accessories and everything baby-related, these Medela Quick Clean Breast Pump and Accessory Wipes can be used anywhere and at any time – no water needed. Quick and easy cleaning: These hygienic wipes are proven safe for cleaning breast pumps, breast shields, and baby feeding and changing accessories. They are unscented and free of alcohols and bleach. Use anywhere: These portable cleaning wipes can be used anywhere. They are sold in an easy to open and resealable 30-pack. Efficient wipes: Medela has engineered these breast pump and accessory wipes to clean quickly and efficiently. One wipe cleans breast shields, valves, and membranes. Cleans more than just breast pumps: We’ve designed these hygienic baby cleaning wipes to clean more than just pumps and equipment. They’re great for cleaning changing tables, high chairs, cribs, countertops, toys, and more. Convenient portable cleaning, no need for soap and water cleaning after each pump session. Hygienic wipes proven safe for cleaning of breast pumps and accessories as well as high chairs, tables, cribs and countertops.

title: imani i2Plus Pro Breast Pump Accessories
detail_text: imani Collection Cup Pro The imani Collection Cup Pro is one part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement if needed. Built for durability and easy use, it ensures continued comfort and efficiency in your pumping routine. With a silicone double seal coupled with a tear-resistant valve, it reduces leaks and outlasts traditional duckbill valves, providing durability for your daily pumping routine. Product does not come with funnel. Only compatible with the imani Funnel Pro. Material Valve: LSR Silicone Protector: LSR Silicone Cup: Polyamide (PA) Product Care Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher imani Funnel Pro – 25mm/28mm The imani Funnel Pro is the one essential part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement when needed. Made for a comfortable, secure fit, it ensures efficient milk expression while maintaining the convenience and simplicity of the hands-free design. For those who find the 25mm funnel not quite the right fit, the 28mm funnel offers a larger size for a more comfortable and secure fit. Product does not come with collection cup. Only compatible with the imani Collection Cup Pro. Material Funnel: Polypropylene (PP) Product Care Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher imani Handsfree Cap Pro The imani Handsfree Cap Pro allows you to connect the imani Handsfree Cup Pro to the imani iBox or other brands of electrical breast pump.
detail_html:
imani Collection Cup Pro

The imani Collection Cup Pro is one part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement if needed. Built for durability and easy use, it ensures continued comfort and efficiency in your pumping routine.

With a silicone double seal coupled with a tear-resistant valve, it reduces leaks and outlasts traditional duckbill valves, providing durability for your daily pumping routine.

Product does not come with funnel. Only compatible with the imani Funnel Pro.

Material

  • Valve: LSR Silicone
  • Protector: LSR Silicone
  • Cup: Polyamide (PA)

Product Care

Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher

imani Funnel Pro – 25mm/28mm

The imani Funnel Pro is the one essential part of the 2-part imani Handsfree Cup Pro set, designed as a replacement when needed. Made for a comfortable, secure fit, it ensures efficient milk expression while maintaining the convenience and simplicity of the hands-free design.

For those who find the 25mm funnel not quite the right fit, the 28mm funnel offers a larger size for a more comfortable and secure fit.

Product does not come with collection cup. Only compatible with the imani Collection Cup Pro.

Material

  • Funnel: Polypropylene (PP)

Product Care

Modes of sterilization include steaming, UV and top rack of dishwasher

imani Handsfree Cap Pro

The imani Handsfree Cap Pro allows you to connect the imani Handsfree Cup Pro to the imani iBox or other brands of electrical breast pump.
