title: Pumpin Pal Super Shields Angled Breast Pumping Flanges for Medela/ Spectra/ Lansinoh/ Pumpables
detail_text: ** FREE Pumpin' Pal Air Dry Bag with purchase of any 2 sets of Pumpin' Pal supershields (while stock lasts). *ALL SUPER SHIELDS and CONNECTORS COMES IN PAIR. This pair of angled breast shield allows most mums to sit back in a more comfortable, natural position while pumping. Works for Medela, Spectra, Lansinoh, Pumpables, Hygeia pumps etc. Other healthful benefits: ✔ Eliminates constriction of milk ducts caused by traditional flanges ✔ Mimicks baby's suckling, hence promoting better milk flow ✔ Reduces irritation to the nipple area ✔ Considerably more comfortable than traditional flanges ✔ Especially effective for new mums and C-section mums ✔ Aids in the prevention of mastitis and other breast infections caused by plugged ducts ✔ Silicone flanges can be lifesavers for moms with elastic nipple tissue ✔ Comes in different sizes to fit nipple diameter from 10mm to 40mm Size Guide: Nipple Diameter 2XS: 10-14mm XS:15-18 mm S: 19-23 mm M: 24-27 mm L: 28-32 mm XL: 30-40 mm You may need the 2XS if: You have a very small nipple and nothing else has worked! [If you’re already using Pumpin’ Pal flanges] When pumping with the blue XS flange and it’s been applied correctly, there is still space between your nipple and the tunnel of the flange. Small, X-Small and 2X-Small ◾ made with medical-grade BPA-free silicone ◾ Includes one pair of collar ring adapters ◾ Dishwasher Safe Medium, Large and X-Large ◾ made with medical-grade BPA-free polypropylene. ◾ Dishwasher Safe Wide Neck Connector: A pair of maymom wide neck connector for Spectra, Ameda Mya, Motif Luna, and other pumps using the wide mouth bottles Standard Neck Connector: A pair of maymom standard neck connector for Medela, Lansinoh and other pumps using the standard mouth bottles Pumpin' Pal Air Dry Accessory Bag: An attractive draw-string mesh bag to keep all your freshly-washed breast pump parts and other accessories too! Ventilated design allows breast pump parts and other accessories to be dried completely (since trapped moisture breeds bacteria) Machine-washable (placing it in laundry bag is recommended) Dimension: 3 × 3 × 0.1 inch Sterilization of Silicone Flange Our silicone flanges can be sterilized with any method, but it's extremely important not to steam all of the water away because the parts can melt and deform under heat without water. *UV sterilization is not recommended. It may help to know that sterilization of PumpinPal parts isn't generally necessary as long as there isn't anyone in the home (including your baby/babies) who is immune-compromised. Human milk is highly resistant to bacterial growth and our silicone and plastics are medical-grade without any pores that can harbor bacteria. Anyway, the easiest and simplest way to sterilise silicone is to simply boil in water for 2-3 minutes.
detail_html:
** FREE Pumpin' Pal Air Dry Bag with purchase of any 2 sets of Pumpin' Pal supershields (while stock lasts).

*ALL SUPER SHIELDS and CONNECTORS COMES IN PAIR.

This pair of angled breast shield allows most mums to sit back in a more comfortable, natural position while pumping.

Works for Medela, Spectra, Lansinoh, Pumpables, Hygeia pumps etc.

Other healthful benefits:

✔ Eliminates constriction of milk ducts caused by traditional flanges

✔ Mimicks baby's suckling, hence promoting better milk flow

✔ Reduces irritation to the nipple area

✔ Considerably more comfortable than traditional flanges

✔ Especially effective for new mums and C-section mums

✔ Aids in the prevention of mastitis and other breast infections caused by plugged ducts

✔ Silicone flanges can be lifesavers for moms with elastic nipple tissue

✔ Comes in different sizes to fit nipple diameter from 10mm to 40mm

Size Guide: Nipple Diameter

2XS: 10-14mm

XS:15-18 mm

S: 19-23 mm

M: 24-27 mm

L: 28-32 mm

XL: 30-40 mm

You may need the 2XS if:

You have a very small nipple and nothing else has worked!

[If you’re already using Pumpin’ Pal flanges] When pumping with the blue XS flange and it’s been applied correctly, there is still space between your nipple and the tunnel of the flange.

Small, X-Small and 2X-Small

◾ made with medical-grade BPA-free silicone

◾ Includes one pair of collar ring adapters

◾ Dishwasher Safe

Medium, Large and X-Large

◾ made with medical-grade BPA-free polypropylene.

◾ Dishwasher Safe

Wide Neck Connector:

A pair of maymom wide neck connector for Spectra, Ameda Mya, Motif Luna, and other pumps using the wide mouth bottles

Standard Neck Connector:

A pair of maymom standard neck connector for Medela, Lansinoh and other pumps using the standard mouth bottles

Pumpin' Pal Air Dry Accessory Bag:

An attractive draw-string mesh bag to keep all your freshly-washed breast pump parts and other accessories too!

Ventilated design allows breast pump parts and other accessories to be dried completely (since trapped moisture breeds bacteria)

Machine-washable (placing it in laundry bag is recommended)

Dimension: 3 × 3 × 0.1 inch

Sterilization of Silicone Flange

Our silicone flanges can be sterilized with any method, but it's extremely important not to steam all of the water away because the parts can melt and deform under heat without water. *UV sterilization is not recommended.

It may help to know that sterilization of PumpinPal parts isn't generally necessary as long as there isn't anyone in the home (including your baby/babies) who is immune-compromised. Human milk is highly resistant to bacterial growth and our silicone and plastics are medical-grade without any pores that can harbor bacteria.  

Anyway, the easiest and simplest way to sterilise silicone is to simply boil in water for 2-3 minutes.

This pair of angled breast shield allows most mums to sit back in a more comfortable, natural position while pumping. Works for Medela, Spectra, Lansinoh, Pumpables, Hygeia pumps etc. Other healthful benefits: ✔ Eliminates constriction of milk ducts caused by traditional flanges ✔ Mimicks baby's suckling, hence promoting better milk flow ✔ Reduces irritation to the nipple area ✔ Considerably more comfortable than traditional flanges ✔ Especially effective for new mums and C-section mums ✔ Aids in the prevention of mastitis and other breast infections caused by plugged ducts ✔ Silicone flanges can be lifesavers for moms with elastic nipple tissue ✔ Comes in different sizes to fit nipple diameter from 10mm to 40mm Size Guide: Nipple Diameter 2XS: 10-14mm XS:15-18 mm S: 19-23 mm M: 24-27 mm L: 28-32 mm XL: 30-40 mm You may need the 2XS if: You have a very small nipple and nothing else has worked! Anyway, the easiest and simplest way to sterilise silicone is to simply boil in water for 2-3 minutes.

brand.name: Pumpin' Pal
brand.suggestion: More Feeding Essentials from Pumpin' Pal

product.desc:
** FREE Pumpin' Pal Air Dry Bag with purchase of any 2 sets of Pumpin' Pal supershields (while stock lasts).

*ALL SUPER SHIELDS and CONNECTORS COMES IN PAIR.

This pair of angled breast shield allows most mums to sit back in a more comfortable, natural position while pumping.

Works for Medela, Spectra, Lansinoh, Pumpables, Hygeia pumps etc.

Other healthful benefits:

✔ Eliminates constriction of milk ducts caused by traditional flanges

✔ Mimicks baby's suckling, hence promoting better milk flow

✔ Reduces irritation to the nipple area

✔ Considerably more comfortable than traditional flanges

✔ Especially effective for new mums and C-section mums

✔ Aids in the prevention of mastitis and other breast infections caused by plugged ducts

✔ Silicone flanges can be lifesavers for moms with elastic nipple tissue

✔ Comes in different sizes to fit nipple diameter from 10mm to 40mm

Size Guide: Nipple Diameter

2XS: 10-14mm

XS:15-18 mm

S: 19-23 mm

M: 24-27 mm

L: 28-32 mm

XL: 30-40 mm

You may need the 2XS if:

You have a very small nipple and nothing else has worked!

[If you’re already using Pumpin’ Pal flanges] When pumping with the blue XS flange and it’s been applied correctly, there is still space between your nipple and the tunnel of the flange.

Small, X-Small and 2X-Small

◾ made with medical-grade BPA-free silicone

◾ Includes one pair of collar ring adapters

◾ Dishwasher Safe

Medium, Large and X-Large

◾ made with medical-grade BPA-free polypropylene.

◾ Dishwasher Safe

Wide Neck Connector:

A pair of maymom wide neck connector for Spectra, Ameda Mya, Motif Luna, and other pumps using the wide mouth bottles

Standard Neck Connector:

A pair of maymom standard neck connector for Medela, Lansinoh and other pumps using the standard mouth bottles

Pumpin' Pal Air Dry Accessory Bag:

An attractive draw-string mesh bag to keep all your freshly-washed breast pump parts and other accessories too!

Ventilated design allows breast pump parts and other accessories to be dried completely (since trapped moisture breeds bacteria)

Machine-washable (placing it in laundry bag is recommended)

Dimension: 3 × 3 × 0.1 inch

Sterilization of Silicone Flange

Our silicone flanges can be sterilized with any method, but it's extremely important not to steam all of the water away because the parts can melt and deform under heat without water. *UV sterilization is not recommended.

It may help to know that sterilization of PumpinPal parts isn't generally necessary as long as there isn't anyone in the home (including your baby/babies) who is immune-compromised. Human milk is highly resistant to bacterial growth and our silicone and plastics are medical-grade without any pores that can harbor bacteria.  

Anyway, the easiest and simplest way to sterilise silicone is to simply boil in water for 2-3 minutes.
product.highlights:
• Eliminates constriction of milk ducts caused by traditional flanges.
  • Promotes better flow.
  • Reduces irritation to the nipple area.
  • Helps users to sit back in a more comfortable, natural position while pumping.
  • Considerably more comfortable than traditional flanges.
  • Can be used with hands-free systems for the ultimate in relaxed and productive pumping.
  • Especially effective for new moms and C-section moms.
  • Aids in the prevention of mastitis and other breast infections caused by plugged ducts.
  • Bisphenol A (BPA) Free.
  • Dishwasher Safe.
  • *Only 2XS, XS and S requires collar ring adapters (included) for fitting purposes

title: Spectra Handsfree Funnel (Piece) - For Spectra Handsfree Cup Set
detail_text: Official Store All Spectra products are made in South Korea, and is the leading breast pump brand in Korea. Mothers from all over the World have been enjoying the benefits from Spectra, including mothers from the USA, Australia, UK, Taiwan & Singapore to name a few. Our pumps are safe, hygienic and widely used by Registered Lactation Nurse & National Hospitals. All the pumps come with back flow protection, to prevent milk traveling down the tubing towards the pump. This technology is to prevent a hygiene risk for mould, transmission of viruses and potentially impairing motor function. Besides, all the components that come in touch with milk are BPA-free.

page_json.name: Spectra Handsfree Funnel (Piece) - For Spectra Handsfree Cup Set
page_json.description: Spectra. Available in 24mm and 25mm. Fits Spectra Handsfree Cup Set. Can be sterilize using UV or Steam. To wash after every pump. Packaging may differ due to shipping restrictions. Official Store. All Spectra products are made in South Korea, and is the leading breast pump brand in Korea. Mothers from all over the World have been enjoying the benefits from Spectra, including mothers from the USA, Australia, UK, Taiwan Singapore to name a few. Our pumps are safe, hygienic and widely used by Registered Lactation Nurse National Hospitals. All the pumps come with back flow protection, to prevent milk traveling down the tubing towards the pump. This technology is to prevent a hygiene risk for mould, transmission of viruses and potentially impairing motor function. Besides, all the components that come in touch with milk are BPA-free

title: Maymom Breast Pump Accessories For Avent Comfort Pump - Duckbill/Flange/Membrane
detail_text: Types: ➤ Breast Pump Kit (Valve/Duckbill, Massage Pad, Flange, Suction Membrane, Top Cap, Tubing) ➤ Replacement Duckbill and Suction Membrane ➤ Replacement Duckbill, Suction Membrane & Top case ➤ 2nd Gen Duckbill Valve for Avent & Spectra _____________________________________________________ Breast Pump Kit: Maymom Breast Pump Kit for Philips Avent Comfort Pump are replacement breast pump kits for Philips Avent Comfort Pump. Sold as single pack. NOTE: The flange is 28 mm internal diameter. With the Massage Pad installed, it will be 25 mm. Contents: 1 x Valve/Duckbill, 1 x Massage Pad, 1 x Flange (25mm), 1 x Suction Membrane . 1 x Top cap. 1 x Tubing _____________________________________________________ Replacement Duckbill and Suction Membrane: Set of replacement parts consisting of valve and diaphragm for Philips Avent Comfort Breast Pump, made by Maymom. It is a set of 2 valves and 2 diaphragms that is compatible for Philips Avent Comfort Single and Double Electric Breast Pumps. It can replace worn or deteriorated diaphragms and valves (duckbill) in your Philips Avent Comfort Electric Breast Pump. Replacing the diaphragm and valve restores the pump's original suction power and keeps it working at peak performance. Replace diaphragms and duckbills every few months or as needed to ensure your pump stays as good as new. Philips Avent Single Electric Comfort Breast Pump Philips Avent Manual Comfort Breast Pump (only the duckbill, not the suction diaphragm) Philips AVENT Double Electric Comfort Breast Pump _____________________________________________________ Replacement Duckbill, Suction Membrane & Top Case Set of replacement parts consisting of valve and diaphragm for Philips Avent Comfort Breast Pump, made by Maymom. It is a set of 2 valves and 2 diaphragms that is compatible for Philips Avent Comfort Single and Double Electric Breast Pumps. It can replace worn or deteriorated diaphragms and valves (duckbill) in your Philips Avent Comfort Electric Breast Pump. Replacing the diaphragm and valve restores the pump's original suction power and keeps it working at peak performance. Replace diaphragms and duckbills every few months or as needed to ensure your pump stays as good as new. _____________________________________________________ Maymom 2nd Gen Duckbill Valve for Avent & Spectra Made to provide the same suction power as the original duckbill valves. It is recommended to replace the breastpump duckbill valve every 3-6 months or when you see a large gap at the tip. Uniquely designed duckbill valve has an easy grab / pull tab that you can attach/detach the duckbill valve onto/from the flange easily.
detail_html:
Types:

➤ Breast Pump Kit (Valve/Duckbill, Massage Pad, Flange, Suction Membrane, Top Cap, Tubing)

➤ Replacement Duckbill and Suction Membrane

➤ Replacement Duckbill, Suction Membrane & Top case

➤ 2nd Gen Duckbill Valve for Avent & Spectra

_____________________________________________________

Breast Pump Kit:

Maymom Breast Pump Kit for Philips Avent Comfort Pump are replacement breast pump kits for Philips Avent Comfort Pump. Sold as single pack. NOTE: The flange is 28 mm internal diameter. With the Massage Pad installed, it will be 25 mm.

Contents:

1 x Valve/Duckbill, 1 x Massage Pad, 1 x Flange (25mm), 1 x Suction Membrane . 1 x Top cap. 1 x Tubing

_____________________________________________________

Replacement Duckbill and Suction Membrane:

Set of replacement parts consisting of valve and diaphragm for Philips Avent Comfort Breast Pump, made by Maymom. It is a set of 2 valves and 2 diaphragms that is compatible for Philips Avent Comfort Single and Double Electric Breast Pumps. It can replace worn or deteriorated diaphragms and valves (duckbill) in your Philips Avent Comfort Electric Breast Pump. Replacing the diaphragm and valve restores the pump's original suction power and keeps it working at peak performance. Replace diaphragms and duckbills every few months or as needed to ensure your pump stays as good as new.

Philips Avent Single Electric Comfort Breast Pump

Philips Avent Manual Comfort Breast Pump (only the duckbill, not the suction diaphragm)

Philips AVENT Double Electric Comfort Breast Pump

_____________________________________________________

Replacement Duckbill, Suction Membrane & Top Case

Set of replacement parts consisting of valve and diaphragm for Philips Avent Comfort Breast Pump, made by Maymom. It is a set of 2 valves and 2 diaphragms that is compatible for Philips Avent Comfort Single and Double Electric Breast Pumps. It can replace worn or deteriorated diaphragms and valves (duckbill) in your Philips Avent Comfort Electric Breast Pump. Replacing the diaphragm and valve restores the pump's original suction power and keeps it working at peak performance. Replace diaphragms and duckbills every few months or as needed to ensure your pump stays as good as new.

_____________________________________________________

Maymom 2nd Gen Duckbill Valve for Avent & Spectra

Made to provide the same suction power as the original duckbill valves. It is recommended to replace the breastpump duckbill valve every 3-6 months or when you see a large gap at the tip. Uniquely designed duckbill valve has an easy grab / pull tab that you can attach/detach the duckbill valve onto/from the flange easily.

detail_text: Keep your breast pump and feeding accessories clean anytime, anywhere with these Breast Pump Cleaning Wipes. Specially formulated to safely remove milk residue, dirt, and bacteria without the need for water or rinsing, making them perfect for busy mums on the go. Key Features Safe for Baby: Alcohol-free, fragrance-free, and BPA-free formula No Rinsing Required: Leaves no harmful residue after wiping Effective Cleaning: Removes milk residue and germs from pump parts Gentle Yet Powerful: Made with food-grade ingredients safe for baby items Convenient & Portable: Ideal for travel, work, or outdoor use Biodegradable Suitable For Breast pump parts Feeding bottles & teats Pacifiers & accessories Milk storage lids and caps How to Use Simply wipe the surface thoroughly and allow it to air dry. No water or rinsing needed. Why Mums Love It Perfect for quick clean-ups between pumping sessions, ensuring hygiene and peace of mind wherever you are. Size : 150 x 200mm 30 Sheets
detail_html:
Keep your breast pump and feeding accessories clean anytime, anywhere with these Breast Pump Cleaning Wipes. Specially formulated to safely remove milk residue, dirt, and bacteria without the need for water or rinsing, making them perfect for busy mums on the go.

Key Features

Safe for Baby: Alcohol-free, fragrance-free, and BPA-free formula

No Rinsing Required: Leaves no harmful residue after wiping

Effective Cleaning: Removes milk residue and germs from pump parts

Gentle Yet Powerful: Made with food-grade ingredients safe for baby items

Convenient & Portable: Ideal for travel, work, or outdoor use

Biodegradable

Suitable For

Breast pump parts

Feeding bottles & teats

Pacifiers & accessories

Milk storage lids and caps

How to Use

Simply wipe the surface thoroughly and allow it to air dry. No water or rinsing needed.

Why Mums Love It

Perfect for quick clean-ups between pumping sessions, ensuring hygiene and peace of mind wherever you are.

Size : 150 x 200mm

30 Sheets
